entries.name: identity-auto-unlock-expired
entries.purpose: Every minute: clear `locked_until` on identities whose lockout expired. Fires IdentityUnlocked(trigger=auto_expiry). Small batch (500 rows) so a heavy backlog can't monopolise the queue.

entries.name: identity-purge-expired-tokens
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: hard-delete PasswordResetToken + EmailVerificationToken rows past TTL. Batched 1000 rows per invocation; recurses until fewer than 1000 remain.

entries.name: identity-purge-soft-deleted
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: hard-delete identities whose `deleted_at + erasure_hold_days < now()` AND have no remaining inbound rows. Compliance-critical — late execution risks breaching the GDPR erasure obligation.

entries.name: identity-active-lockouts-gauge
entries.purpose: Every minute: emit the `academorix.identity.active_lockouts` gauge for dashboarding.
